title: senecio adglacialis
intro: Senecio adglacialis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the Andes mountain range in South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio adglacialis include reducing inflammation and improving lung function, making it a potential natural remedy for respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of Senecio adglacialis, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used in traditional medicine in the Andean region, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
